privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: {name} is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
privacy.s2Intro: We may collect information about you in a variety of ways:
privacy.s2Item1: Personal data: name, email address, phone number, and shipping address when you place an order.
privacy.s2Item2: Payment information: processed securely through our payment provider — we do not store card details.
privacy.s2Item3: Usage data: pages visited, time spent, browser type, and referring pages for analytics purposes.
privacy.s2Item4: Cookies: small data files to improve your browsing experience.
privacy.s3Item1: To process and fulfill your orders.
privacy.s3Item2: To communicate with you about your orders, inquiries, and promotions.
privacy.s3Item3: To improve our website, products, and services.
privacy.s4Body: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business (payment processors, delivery services) under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s5Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s6Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using the {name} website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the website.
terms.s2Body: All products are subject to availability. We reserve the right to limit quantities, refuse orders, or discontinue products at any time. Prices are subject to change without notice.
terms.s3Body: Payment is required at the time of order. We accept major credit cards and other payment methods as displayed at checkout. All transactions are processed securely.
terms.s4Body: {name} is not responsible for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control. Please ensure delivery address details are accurate at the time of ordering.
terms.s5Body: Due to the perishable nature of our products, we do not accept returns. If you are unsatisfied with your order, please contact us within 24 hours of delivery and we will do our best to resolve the issue.
terms.s6Body: All content on this website — including text, images, logos, and designs — is the property of {name} and protected by applicable copyright laws. Reproduction without written permission is prohibited.
terms.s7Body: Questions about these Terms of Service? Contact us at

checkout.successMessage: Thank you for your order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
